name: claude-skills
description: PR review and PR fix slash commands for Claude Code.

plugins.name: local
plugins.description: Ten user-invokable skills + the pr-review-engine dispatcher: PR branch switching, pre-PR local review, GitHub PR review, PR-fix automation, draft PR creation, doc-to-Linear plan extraction, TIB scaffolding, TIP (implementation plan) scaffolding, yolo TIB-ship orchestrator (scaffold-implement-self-review loop, TDD per block), and rubric setup. 15-agent review library (6 baseline + 9 conditional, including route-level runtime validation via agent-browser) + SessionStart hook that auto-installs 18 Vercel/community rubric skills.
